shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌牵着予予站在幼儿园门口
shots.location_evidence: line 15: △ （中景）沈念歌牵着予予站在幼儿园门口。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual description only; no dialogue or props; foreground focuses on main characters.

shots.keyframe_moment: 一个穿着高定风衣的妈妈牵着女儿走过来，瞥了沈念歌一眼
shots.location_evidence: line 17: △ 一个穿着高定风衣的妈妈牵着女儿走过来，瞥了沈念歌一眼。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual action introducing extra characters; Shen in background; no inheritance from previous.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_PARENT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这个人怎么进的星辉？赞助费一年二十万，她穿得像刚从菜市场来的。

shots.location_evidence: line 19: **风衣妈妈**（对旁边的闺蜜低声）："这个人怎么进的星辉？赞助费一年二十万，她穿得像刚从菜市场来的。"
shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue to implied friend (same alias as listener); no action targets; low voice implies private.

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌低头看自己衣服，然后牵紧予予的手走进去
shots.location_evidence: line 21-23: △ 沈念歌听到了。她低头看了一眼自己的白T恤和帆布鞋... △ 但她没有低头。她牵紧予予的手，走进了幼儿园。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual reaction and action; no dialogue; scene transition but continuous.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，你在想什么？

shots.location_evidence: line 25: **沈知予**（仰头看她）："妈咪，你在想什么？"
shots.reasoning_brief: Direct address to mother; gaze specified.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 在想予予今天要好好表现。

shots.location_evidence: line 27: **沈念歌**（笑了一下）："在想予予今天要好好表现。"
shots.reasoning_brief: Response to child; no specific gaze beyond smile.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 放心吧！我最厉害了！

shots.location_evidence: line 29: **沈知予**（挺胸）："放心吧！我最厉害了！"
shots.reasoning_brief: Child responding to mother; posture indicates confidence.

shots.keyframe_moment: 教室中家长和孩子坐成圈，老师在中间
shots.location_evidence: line 37: △ （中景）教室宽敞明亮...十几个孩子和他们的家长坐成一圈，老师站在中间。
shots.reasoning_brief: Scene change to classroom; many extras; cardinality approximate but exact 13+ from description.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 今天是我们中班的第一天，请小朋友们轮流做自我介绍好不好？先说名字，再说一个关于自己的秘密。

shots.location_evidence: line 39: **老师**（笑着）："今天是我们中班的第一天..."
shots.reasoning_brief: Address to group; no specific listener; voiceover-like but onscreen.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 大家好，我叫沈知予。小名予予。

shots.location_evidence: line 47: **沈知予**（声音清脆）："大家好，我叫沈知予。小名予予。"
shots.reasoning_brief: Self-introduction to group.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的秘密是什么呀？

shots.location_evidence: line 49: **老师**："予予的秘密是什么呀？"
shots.reasoning_brief: Direct question to child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但我还没见过他。等我找到他，他会变得很厉害。

shots.location_evidence: line 51: **沈知予**（想了想，很认真地说）："我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人..."
shots.reasoning_brief: Sharing to group; serious tone.

character_state_overlays.body_state: 手指紧握掌心显示紧张

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌坐在角落，手指掐掌心
shots.location_evidence: line 57: △ 沈念歌坐在角落的家长席上，手指掐进了掌心。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual tension state from action; no dialogue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 予予的爸爸一定很了不起。那你有没有什么爱好呢？

shots.location_evidence: line 59: **老师**（愣了一下，随即温柔地）："予予的爸爸一定很了不起..."
shots.reasoning_brief: Response to child; gentle after pause.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我喜欢画画。还有数学。100以内的加减法我都能算。

shots.location_evidence: line 61: **沈知予**："我喜欢画画。还有数学..."
shots.reasoning_brief: Response to teacher.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: EXTRA_TEACHER
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 真的吗？那老师考考你。37加58等于多少？

shots.location_evidence: line 63: **老师**（惊讶）："真的吗？那老师考考你..."
shots.reasoning_brief: Question to child; includes visual of child preparing answer.
Direct answer.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 这个很简单呀。

shots.location_evidence: line 73: **沈知予**（歪头，无害地笑了）："这个很简单呀。"
shots.reasoning_brief: Follow-up comment to group.

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌看着儿子抿嘴叹气，然后转场放学全景
shots.shot_local_location: 幼儿园教室 to 幼儿园门口·傍晚
shots.location_evidence: line 77: △ 沈念歌看着儿子... line 85: △ （全景）放学...
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual reaction and scene transition; internal thought not narrated.

shots.keyframe_moment: 沈念歌等公交，予予跑出来
shots.location_evidence: line 87: △ 沈念歌站在路边，等公交车。 line 89: △ 予予背着小书包，从幼儿园里跑出来。
shots.reasoning_brief: Scene change to evening; bus wait implies local location.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪！今天老师说我是全班最聪明的！还给我多发了一颗小星星！

shots.location_evidence: line 91: **沈知予**（兴奋地）："妈咪！今天老师说我是全班最聪明的..."
shots.reasoning_brief: Excited address to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 真棒。

shots.location_evidence: line 93: **沈念歌**（蹲下来帮他整理书包）："真棒。"
shots.reasoning_brief: Praise while action on child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，我告诉你一个秘密。

shots.location_evidence: line 95: **沈知予**（压低声音，一脸神秘）："妈咪，我告诉你一个秘密。"
shots.reasoning_brief: Secret to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 什么秘密？

shots.location_evidence: line 97: **沈念歌**："什么秘密？"
shots.reasoning_brief: Response to child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我今天在幼儿园走廊上看到一张照片。挂在荣誉墙上。一个穿西装的男人，下面写着'陆氏集团总裁陆景琛先生捐赠'。妈咪——就是医院的那个叔叔！
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 左右看了看，凑到她耳边

shots.location_evidence: line 99: **沈知予**（左右看了看，凑到她耳边）："我今天在幼儿园走廊上看到一张照片..."
shots.reasoning_brief: Whisper to mother; maps '叔叔' to LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN via context.

shots.location_evidence: line 101: △ （近景）沈念歌的表情僵了一瞬。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual reaction state.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 嗯……可能是吧。

shots.location_evidence: line 103: **沈念歌**（声音尽量平稳）："嗯……可能是吧。"
shots.reasoning_brief: Calm response to child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我就知道！他就住在这个城市！妈咪，你今天不是去他上班的地方了吗？你有没有看到他？

shots.location_evidence: line 105: **沈知予**（眼睛亮了）："我就知道！他就住在这个城市..."
shots.reasoning_brief: Excited question to mother.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 走了，公交车来了。

shots.location_evidence: line 109: **沈念歌**（岔开话题）："走了，公交车来了。"
shots.reasoning_brief: Topic change; action to child implied.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，他既然捐赠了幼儿园，说明他是个好人。好人的话，应该不会不认自己的儿子吧？
dialogue_annotations.gaze_rule: 被牵着上了车，还在回头看着幼儿园的方向

shots.location_evidence: line 111: **沈知予**（被牵着上了车，还在回头看着幼儿园的方向）："妈咪，他既然捐赠了幼儿园..."
shots.reasoning_brief: Question while boarding bus.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 查到了吗？

shots.location_evidence: line 123: **陆景琛**（电话里）："查到了吗？"
planning_errors_in_current_rule_output: rule_output incorrectly places Shen listening; actual is Zhao on phone
shots.reasoning_brief: Phone call; speaker offscreen, listener onscreen; prop from detected.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 查到了。陆总，那个孩子……确实在星辉。今天第一天入园。

shots.location_evidence: line 125: **赵一鸣**："查到了。陆总，那个孩子……确实在星辉。今天第一天入园。"
shots.reasoning_brief: Response on phone; child refers to SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 他今天说了什么？

shots.location_evidence: line 129: **陆景琛**："他今天说了什么？"
shots.reasoning_brief: Offscreen question.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 他说……'我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但还没见过他。'

shots.location_evidence: line 131: **赵一鸣**（犹豫了一下）："他说……'我爸爸是这个城市最厉害的人。但还没见过他。'"
shots.reasoning_brief: Quotes child's earlier line.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LU_JINGCHEN_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: ……知道了。

shots.location_evidence: line 135: **陆景琛**（声音很轻）："……知道了。"
shots.reasoning_brief: Soft close to call.

shots.location_evidence: line 141: △ （特写）轿车后视镜里，公交车已经消失在路的尽头。
music_cues: 吉他轻拨，一丝暖意中带着悬念
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual close; music from line 143 as cue only.
